narration: The stack holds the characters that have survived so far.
callout: The top is the most recent surviving character.

narration: When the next b arrives, it matches the top b, so the pair disappears and we pop.
Later a matches a on top too, so that pair disappears. The surviving letters end up as c and a.
callout: The stack becomes the cleaned-up final string.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Why can removing one pair create another pair next to each other?
reflectionPrompt.placeholder: Removing one pair can create another because...
